nasb.text: They answered Him, “Jesus the Nazarene.” He *said to them, “I am He.” And Judas also, who was betraying Him, was standing with them.

esv.text: They answered him, “Jesus of Nazareth.” Jesus said to them, “I am he.” Judas, who betrayed him, was standing with them.

cnv.text: 他們回答：“拿撒勒人耶穌！”耶穌說：“我就是。”出賣耶穌的猶大和他們站在那裡。

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“拿撒勒人耶稣！” 耶稣说：“我就是。”那时出卖耶稣的犹大也站在他们当中。

csbs.text: 他们回答：“拿撒勒人耶稣。” 耶稣说：“我就是。” 出卖他的犹大也与他们站在一起。
